found.quote: Vendor may study service records, build trend reports, tune automated systems, create commercial benchmarks, and enhance offerings for accounts other than Customer.
Vendor may study service records, build trend reports, tune automated systems, create commercial benchmarks, and enhance offerings for accounts other than Customer.
Operational copies retained for continuity, diagnostics, or legal administration may be kept for 365 days under internal retention standards.
Vendor will limit Personal Data access to personnel who need it to perform the services. Vendor will provide internal onboarding materials to personnel assigned to the service.

Personal Data" means raw individual records uploaded by Customer that directly name a natural person, but excludes service measurements, statistical summaries, transformed outputs, connection metadata, and account-level observations.
